name: 24" Harwich High Back Windsor Counter Height Barstool with Footrest - Threshold™
description:
Update your kitchen area with the Harwich High-Back Windsor counter stool from Threshold™. Sporting a high, slanted, slatted back for an open and airy feel, the decorative wooden stool has a contoured seat for additional comfort and splayed legs for traditional flair. This wood-finish stool is a perfect match for your home and makes for a comfy seating spot in your kitchen or dining area.

If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.
